results.Query: Add new node with name new_EK_PORT_33 type EK_PORT, to ju1.s2.s2c6. Return a graph.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-1, add
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_33', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.s2.s2c6', 'new_EK_PORT_33', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {
        'type': 'graph',
        'data': graph_json,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
    return return_object

results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_70', type=['EK_PACKET_SWITCH'])
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a3.m4', 'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_70', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if any(edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and edge[0] == 'ju1.a3.m4' for edge in graph_copy.edges(data=True) if edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and (edge[0] == 'ju1.a3.m4' and edge[1] == node[0] or edge[1] == 'ju1.a3.m4' and edge[0] == node[0]))]
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {"type": "list", "data": child_nodes, "updated_graph": graph_json}
    return return_object

def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_84', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a2.m2', 'new_EK_PORT_84', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if node[0] != 'ju1.a2.m2' and any(edge[1] == 'ju1.a2.m2' for edge in graph_copy.in_edges(node[0]))]
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {'type': 'list', 'data': child_nodes, 'updated_graph': graph_json}
    return return_object
